web.markdown:
[Jump to content](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_largest_dams#bodyContent) From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia The following table lists the largest man-made dams by volume of fill/structure. A dam is generally defined as a barrier that impounds water or underground flows, so [tailings dams](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Tailings_dams&action=edit&redlink=1 "Tailings dams (page does not exist)") are relegated to a separate list. Data on volume of structure is not as readily available or reliable as data on dam height and reservoir volume. **Type:** TE - Earth; ER - Rock-fill; PG - Concrete gravity; CFRD - Concrete face rockfill | Rank | Name | Country | Year
